description: An interior courtyard viewed through large horseshoe arches supported by slender columns. Several figures sit cross-legged on colorful woven carpets spread across the tiled floor. One standing figure in a white garment with a red head-covering carries a tray near the foreground. The arches frame a deeper space with additional columns and vaulted ceilings. Shoes are left at the edge of the carpets. Soft light filters through the arcade, casting gentle shadows. The walls show aged plaster with patches of green and ochre.
